ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group assignment for the participant (e.g., control, experimental) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant was enrolled in the trial */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Participant's medical history */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Participant's contact information */,
  "consent_form_signed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant signed the consent form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant undergoing the trial */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Trial number indicating the sequence of trials for the participant */,
  "trial_date" TEXT /* Date the trial was conducted */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., single-session, multi-session) */,
  "stimuli_type" TEXT /* Type of stimuli used in the trial */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the trial (e.g., temperature, lighting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial associated with this response */,
  "index" INTEGER /* Index for the response in the trial */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Response time in milliseconds */,
  "heart_enhancement" INTEGER /* Heart enhancement measurement */,
  "pcpp" INTEGER /* Physiological response measurement (e.g., PCPP) */,
  "other_physiological_metrics" TEXT /* Other physiological metrics measured during the trial (e.g., skin conductance, facial expressions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trial data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institutional_affiliation" TEXT /* User's institutional affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  "stimulus_description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_stimuli" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus used in the trial */,
  "stimulus_order" INTEGER /* Order of the stimulus in the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id", "stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physiological_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., skin conductance, facial expressions) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_metrics" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric for the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id", "metric_id")
)
